SELECT u1.signup_date, u1.is_verified, u1.country_code, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.country_code LIKE '%a%' UNION SELECT u2.signup_date, u2.is_verified, u2.country_code, u2.username FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.id < 590

SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at > DATETIME('now', '-15 days') UNION ALL SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.user_id, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id <= 75
SELECT p1.id, p1.content, p1.user_id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.posted_at >= DATETIME('now', '-4 days') UNION SELECT p2.id, p2.content, p2.user_id FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.id >= 279 ORDER BY id

SELECT p1.posted_at, p1.view_count, p1.content, p1.id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.posted_at >= DATETIME('now', '-19 days') UNION SELECT p2.posted_at, p2.view_count, p2.content, p2.id FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.view_count <> 376 ORDER BY posted_at

SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at < DATETIME('now', '-24 days') UNION SELECT f2.followee_id, f2.follower_id, f2.followed_at FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followee_id = 145
SELECT u1.username, u1.signup_date, u1.email FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.country_code <> 'test' UNION SELECT u2.username, u2.signup_date, u2.email FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.username LIKE 'b%'
SELECT l1.user_id, l1.post_id, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id < 16 UNION SELECT l2.user_id, l2.post_id, l2.liked_at FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.post_id < 745 LIMIT 20
SELECT p1.content, p1.id, p1.view_count, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.user_id = 11 UNION ALL SELECT p2.content, p2.id, p2.view_count, p2.posted_at FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.content = 'test'
SELECT u1.email, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.country_code = 'admin' UNION ALL SELECT u2.email, u2.username FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.country_code = 'admin' ORDER BY email

SELECT u1.id, u1.is_verified, u1.country_code, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.is_verified = 0 UNION SELECT u2.id, u2.is_verified, u2.country_code, u2.username FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.is_verified = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT u1.username, u1.signup_date, u1.id FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id <> 545 UNION SELECT u2.username, u2.signup_date, u2.id FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.id > 75 ORDER BY username

SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id > 12 UNION ALL SELECT f2.followed_at, f2.followee_id, f2.follower_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followee_id < 854 LIMIT 50

SELECT p1.view_count, p1.id, p1.user_id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.posted_at > DATETIME('now', '-4 days') UNION SELECT p2.view_count, p2.id, p2.user_id FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.posted_at >= DATETIME('now', '-29 days')

SELECT u1.id, u1.email, u1.signup_date, u1.country_code FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-1 days') UNION SELECT u2.id, u2.email, u2.signup_date, u2.country_code FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.username LIKE '%a%'
SELECT c1.created_at, c1.comment_text, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.comment_text = 'user' UNION ALL SELECT c2.created_at, c2.comment_text, c2.post_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.id < 887
SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id > 862 UNION SELECT f2.followee_id, f2.followed_at FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followee_id > 505
SELECT u1.signup_date, u1.email FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.country_code LIKE 'b%' UNION SELECT u2.signup_date, u2.email FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.username <> '123' ORDER BY signup_date
SELECT u1.id, u1.email, u1.country_code FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.username = 'admin' UNION SELECT u2.id, u2.email, u2.country_code FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.id <> 347 ORDER BY id

SELECT u1.country_code, u1.is_verified, u1.id, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.email <> 'user6@example.com' UNION ALL SELECT u2.country_code, u2.is_verified, u2.id, u2.signup_date FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.is_verified = 0
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.liked_at, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id <= 981 UNION SELECT l2.post_id, l2.liked_at, l2.user_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.post_id <> 883

SELECT u1.email, u1.country_code, u1.username, u1.is_verified FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.country_code = 'activity' UNION ALL SELECT u2.email, u2.country_code, u2.username, u2.is_verified FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.username LIKE '%c' ORDER BY email

SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at < DATETIME('now', '-4 days') UNION SELECT f2.follower_id, f2.followed_at, f2.followee_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.follower_id <> 946
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at <= DATETIME('now', '-7 days') UNION ALL SELECT l2.post_id, l2.user_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.post_id = 599 ORDER BY post_id
